rationale: Existing Gold rows rely heavily on direction, so test trend-quality erosion signals that exit when trend strength decays before price crosses.
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
stop_conditions: no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
candidate family remains crowded or redundant
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
trend-quality signal is redundant with EMA/VJATR exits
candidate exits early in melt-up or rebound windows
